programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine falls in love with a set of Art Deco-style silver butter knives and gambles on a little penny bank. Mark Hill springs for an Edwardian writing table in incredible condition and is excited about a rare piece of studio glass.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre una discrepancia en los restos de ADN al investigar el accidente de un avión militar que transportaba ataúdes.

programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amigos en necesidad
programme.desc: Jamie y Danny difieren en cómo manejar a un novato imprudente del NYPD, Marcus, hijo de un amigo de Danny. Mientras tanto, Erin investiga una mala inversión en la que se vio envuelto su investigador, Anthony, por culpa de su primo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ciudad despiadada
programme.desc: Frank y Danny colaboran para ayudar a Nick Constantine, un exconvicto rehabilitado que Frank había encarcelado años atrás, cuando Constantine se ve implicado en el asesinato de un viejo enemigo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al sur para investigar a un veloz asesino cuya firma coincide con la de un asesino en serie de hace 30 años. Además, el equipo descubre que alguien los sigue e imita los crímenes que ya han resuelto.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Reid descubre que su novia fue secuestrada por su acosador, él y el equipo de la UAC se reúnen para encontrarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: Señales de amor
programme.desc: En el transcurso de una noche mágica, Jonathan (John Cusack) y Sara (Kate Beckinsale) se conocen de manera inesperada, luego cada uno se va por su lado, dejando que el destino guíe su futuro, si es que se supone que terminen juntos.

programme.title: Almas gemelas
programme.desc: La frontal Amanda y la refinada Alyssa cambian de identidad con el objetivo de acercar a Roger (padre de Alyssa) y Diana (trabajadora social de Amanda).

programme.title: ¿Quién llamó a la cigüeña?
programme.desc: La vida de J.C. (Diane Keaton), una mujer de clase alta obsesionada con el trabajo, da un vuelco cuando 'hereda' una bebé.

programme.title: 10 años
programme.desc: Un grupo de amigos se reencuentran en la reunión de alumnos de su secundaria. Cada uno tiene una historia increíble para contar.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: A Walk On The Moon
programme.desc: En el verano de 1969, Pearl (Diane Lane) conoce a un extraño sensual y de espíritu libre (Viggo Mortensen), durante unas tediosas vacaciones familiares más con su esposo. Así que hará lo impensable: tener un intrépido y apasionado amorío.

programme.title: Un disparo en la sombra
programme.desc: Al torpe inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers) se le asigna un importante caso, pero se enamora de la principal sospechosa (Elke Sommer), aumentan los cadáveres y Clouseau debe darse prisa por encontrar al verdadero culpable o su carrera acabará.

programme.title: El retorno de la Pantera Rosa
programme.desc: El ladrón de guante blanco Sir Charles Litton vuelve al ataque. Enviado a la ciudad de Gstadd por su superior, el inspector Dreyfuss, Clouseau adopta una serie de cambios y disfraces mientras investiga a Sir Charles y su mujer Claudine.

programme.title: La pantera rosa ataca de nuevo
programme.desc: La incompetencia del Inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers) acaba enloqueciendo al Inspector Jefe Dreyfus (Herbert Lom) quien se apodera de una máquina para destruir el mundo con el fin de matar a Clouseau. ¿Quién ganará, 26 sicarios o la suerte de Clouseau?

programme.title: La maldición de la Pantera Rosa
programme.desc: Del legendario director Blake Edwards, esta encantadora comedia gira entorno a la más ineficiente de las búsquedas del detective más inepto de Francia. Protagonizada por Ted Wass, Herbert Lom, David Niven, Capucine, Burt Kwouk y Robert Loggia.

programme.title: La captura de Pelham 1-2-3
programme.desc: Tres hombres secuestran un vagón del metro neoyorquino y piden un rescate millonario por los pasajeros a bordo. Walter Matthau, Robert Shaw, Martin Balsam, Hector Elizondo, Earl Hindman, Jerry Stiller, Tony Roberts, Lee Wallace, James Broderick.

programme.title: Cabalgata infernal
programme.desc: Jesse James y su banda cabalgan de nuevo interpretan a unos hermanos de la vida real en esta representación de bandidos del Viejo Oeste. Protagonizada por, David, Keith, y Robert Carradine, James y Stacy Keach, Randy y Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito detectives
programme.desc: Un comandante amigo de Chabelo y Pepito les pide que lo ayuden a descubrir una banda que rapta niños. Ellos aceptan y se infiltran en la banda para descubrir que los villanos son seres de otro planeta

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: El rostro oscuro de la ley
programme.desc: “Del autor de Training Day”, llega este excelente drama sobre policías corruptos, ambientado en los días previos a los disturbios en la ciudad de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Un plan sencillo
programme.desc: Dos hermanos encuentran cuatro millones de dólares en una avioneta caída e intentan quedarse con el dinero, pero la paranoia, la codicia y el miedo a ser capturado hacen que su plan esté fuera de control, con consecuencias desastrosas.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: El abogado Richard Ramsay (Keanu Reeves) trabaja en un caso difícil para defender a Mike Lassiter, de 17 años, sospechoso de asesinar a su adinerado padre.

programme.title: Crepúsculo
programme.desc: Le leyenda del cine, Paul Newman encabeza un electo luminoso en esta aclamada intriga llena de estrellas y suspenso.

programme.title: Tierra de policias
programme.desc: El director de Ford vs. Ferrari junta a un elenco de estrellas que incluye a Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta y Harvey Keitel en este tenso thriller lleno de acción y crimen.

programme.title: El hijo de Dios
programme.desc: La historia de la vida de Jesús se cuenta desde su humilde nacimiento a través de sus enseñanzas, crucifixión y resurrección final.

programme.title: Babel (ESP)
programme.desc: Del aclamado director Alejandro González Iñárritu (Amores Perros, 21 Gramos) llega el tercer filme de su trilogía, Babel, una película aplaudida por la crítica y de una gran emotividad sobre las barreras que separan a la humanidad.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate (LAS)
programme.desc: Roman Polanski dirige y Johnny Depp protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural sobre un vendedor de libros raros que descubre un manuscrito demoníaco.

programme.title: El álamo
programme.desc: John Wayne y Richard Widmark protagonizan esta espectacular película histórica sobre el ataque de las tropas mexicanas en el in Álamo.

programme.title: Babel (ESP)
programme.desc: Del aclamado director Alejandro González Iñárritu (Amores Perros, 21 Gramos) llega el tercer filme de su trilogía, Babel, una película aplaudida por la crítica y de una gran emotividad sobre las barreras que separan a la humanidad.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Atrapen al gringo
programme.desc: Un criminal de carrera, capturado por las autoridades mexicanas, es enviado a una prisión de alta seguridad donde aprende a sobrevivir con la ayuda de un niño

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: Un mafioso atrapa a dos ladrones de autos mientras le roban y les da una semana para conseguirle un Ferrari clásico. Si no, podrían perderlo todo.

programme.title: Survivor (2015)
programme.desc: Incriminada por crímenes que no cometió, una diplomática (Milla Jovovich, El quinto elemento) trata de impedir un ataque terrorista en Nueva York. Con Pierce Brosnan y Dylan McDermott.

programme.title: Atrapen al gringo
programme.desc: Un criminal de carrera, capturado por las autoridades mexicanas, es enviado a una prisión de alta seguridad donde aprende a sobrevivir con la ayuda de un niño

programme.title: La sombra de los culpables
programme.desc: Dos policías corruptos asesinan a un agente secreto de la DEA por error, e intentan frenéticamente borrar sus rastros incriminando a un vagabundo. Eso implica falsificar evidencias, entrenar testigos, e improvisar para que no se descubra su plan.

programme.title: El hombre sin pasado
programme.desc: Un tranquilo cuidador en una casa de empeño, con un pasado violento, se enfrenta a una red de tráfico de drogas y órganos con la esperanza de salvar a una niña que es su única amiga.

programme.title: El hijo de Rambow
programme.desc: Una historia fresca sobre la amistad, la familia, los héroes cinematográficos y la riesgosa aventura de crecer en la era del video.

programme.title: Héroes
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estadounidenses con habilidades especiales deben apurarse para encontrar a una chica en Hong Kong antes de que lo haga una sombría organización gubernamental llamada División.

programme.title: El ilusionista
programme.desc: En este drama nominado al Óscar ambientado en la Viena de principios de 1900, el ilusionista Eisenheim (Edward Norton, Historia americana X) usa sus poderes para encantar a una aristócrata comprometida.

programme.title: El hijo de Rambow
programme.desc: Una historia fresca sobre la amistad, la familia, los héroes cinematográficos y la riesgosa aventura de crecer en la era del video.

programme.title: Héroes
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estadounidenses con habilidades especiales deben apurarse para encontrar a una chica en Hong Kong antes de que lo haga una sombría organización gubernamental llamada División.

programme.title: El ilusionista
programme.desc: En este drama nominado al Óscar ambientado en la Viena de principios de 1900, el ilusionista Eisenheim (Edward Norton, Historia americana X) usa sus poderes para encantar a una aristócrata comprometida.

programme.title: Blizzard: Un reno muy especial
programme.desc: Una historia encantadora de Katie y su amistad mágica con Blizzard, uno de los renos más nuevos de Santa. Blizzard usa sus poderes especiales para ayudar a Katie a darse cuenta de su potencial y fuerza interior.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: Norbit (ESP)
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: Jefe de estado
programme.desc: Cuando Washington necesita desesperadamente un candidato presidencial que sea garantía de perder las elecciones, escogen a Mayes Gilliam (Chris Rock), un desconocido político local de barrio, para que sea su títere.

programme.title: South Park: Más grande, más larga y sin censura
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny y Cartman ven una película prohibida para menores que les deforma sus frágiles cabezas. Sus padres no tardan en declarar la guerra a Canadá y los chicos son la última esperanza que tiene Estados Unidos para frenar el Armagedón.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su TV, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que les muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son le mejor!

programme.title: Escuela de rock
programme.desc: Jack Black interpreta a un guitarrista con delirios de grandeza. Cuando lo echan de la banda, y se pone a buscar trabajo, se convierte en un maestro suplente y hace de su clase una banda de rock and roll.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa
programme.desc: El torpe Inspector Clouseau (Steve Martin) se encarga de investigar el asesinato de un famoso entrenador de fútbol y el robo del diamante Pantera Rosa, de inestimable valor. Él y su compañero Gilbert Ponton (Jean Reno) van de calamidad en calamidad.

programme.title: El Infierno (LAS)
programme.desc: Benny has been deported from the United States back to a Mexico that is being ripped apart by warring drug cartels. He gets involved in the narco business and begins to rocket up through the ranks, and is surrounded by money, women, violence, and fun.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: El Camino Correcto
programme.desc: Arturo, un niño de la ciudad de El Verde Bonao en la República Dominicana rural, aprovecha las posibilidades que se le presentan al ir a la ciudad con la esperanza de ayudar a su madre, que acaba de ser diagnosticada con leucemia.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: Pueblo Navideño
programme.desc: Una adicta al trabajo sospecha de la partida repentina de su padre para mudarse a un pequeño pueblo en Navidad.

programme.title: Golden Winter LAS
programme.desc: Un chico se hace amigo de una camada de Golden Retrievers sin hogar. Juntos, ayudan a detener un robo a un banco justo a tiempo para Navidad.

programme.title: Accidente en Navidad
programme.desc: Una pareja que está a punto de divorciarse, se estrella en su avioneta en el bosque. Sus hijos los rescatan y descubren que no fue un accidente. Estar cerca a la muerte les recuerda que todavía se aman.

programme.title: De chef a princesa en Navidad
programme.desc: Un príncipe de Europa llega a Nueva York y se enamora del chef que está planeando su evento anual de Navidad.

programme.title: Navidad Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Con solo dos días antes de Navidad, Angelina se embarca en una misión casi imposible para tratar de salvar a su malcriada hija de 14 años, de ir por el camino equivocado. ¿Podrá Angelina sacar a su hija de la lista de los traviesos?

programme.title: Navidad en cuatro patas
programme.desc: Maggie y Jack, dos personas solteras, tratan de regalar un perro a sus hijos de Navidad. Su lucha por la custodia de un mismo animal, les lleva a hacer algo que nunca hubieran esperado: enamorarse.

programme.title: Los 12 perros de Navidad
programme.desc: Un padre viudo y desempleado envía a regañadientes a su hija a permanecer con su tía en una ciudad que ha prohibido los perros. En el camino a la escuela un día encuentra un perrito y decide quedárselo.

programme.title: El perro que salvó la navidad de vacaciones
programme.desc: Un astuto can y un caniche francés deben salvar su hogar de unos tontos ladrones que atacan durante las vacaciones de Navidad.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: 150 muertos y 350 desaparecidos en la pequeña ciudad montañosa de Snowfield, Colorado. Y ese es tan solo el comienzo...

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: 150 muertos y 350 desaparecidos en la pequeña ciudad montañosa de Snowfield, Colorado. Y ese es tan solo el comienzo...

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: El juego del duende
programme.desc: Después de que un grupo de ladrones es enviado a cazar leyendas urbanas, roban el oro de un duende, solo para descubrir que hay que pagar un alto precio.

programme.title: Terrifier (LAS)
programme.desc: Art el payaso regresa y pone su mirada en tres mujeres jóvenes, junto con cualquiera que se meta en su camino.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return of the Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates, and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Guns Of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos
programme.desc: It took some time after the Civil War for the South to recover. Towns imposed martial law to maintain order and the "good guys" banded together against the criminals.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: Sabata
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Donovan's Reef
programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: This Oscar®-nominated film has the legendary Cary Grant as a government attorney who can't seem to shake his bad fortune. Living on a houseboat, widowed and left with three unruly kids, he hires Sophia Loren as a governess.

programme.title: Fear Strikes Out
programme.desc: True story of the life of Jimmy Piersall, who battled mental illness to achieve stardom in major league baseball.

programme.title: The Bells Of St Mary's
programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.title: Birdman of Alcatraz
programme.desc: Burt Lancaster stars in the true story of killer Robert Stroud, who spent 43 years in solitary confinement at Alcatraz, and who educated himself, becoming a world renowned authority on birds. Thelma Ritter, Telly Savalas and Karl Malden co-star.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is a look-out for burglars robbing the base.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter wants his men to pass a promotion test.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer holds a wedding ring for a friend and it appears to be lost when they spend a night baking bread.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, de 19 años, fue condenada por apuñalar a su madre, Barbara Mullenix, en el 2006. Supuestamente cargó el cuerpo sangriento de su madre en una caja de cartón antes de tirarla en Newport Bay, en California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo poco profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, una agencia federal dictaminó que Terri Strickland había provocado intencionalmente el fuego que mató a su hijo de 17 meses, Josh Hinson.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sin oraciones
programme.desc: La fundadora de American Atheists desapareció en 1995 junto con uno de sus hijos y su nieta, junto con 500,000 dólares en monedas de oro. La policía se centró en varios sospechosos, incluyendo a David R. Waters, que trabajaba para los Ateos Americanos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Genes delatores
programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación del secuestro de la esposa de un prominente banquero llevó a la policía a una persecución inútil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bomba, construida para poder causar tanto daño como sea posible, mata a la víctima con una fuerza y llama mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la universitaria Jenna Verhaalen fue encontrada muerta en su departamento de Bryan, Texas y las hemorragias petequiales en sus ojos indicaron que fue estrangulada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noticia del brutal asesinato de una azafata hizo que el hijo de una víctima que había sido asesinada cinco años antes se pusiera en contacto con la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El examinador médico clasificó la muerte como un accidente, pero los detectives que investigaron el caso declararon que la evidencia en la escena indicaba lo contrario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Dorothy Donovan fue asesinada en su casa de Dover, Delaware. Cuando su hijo declaró que fue asesinada por un polizón que la había recogido, la policía se mostró escéptica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía descubre un carro agujereado de balas, un conductor extraviado y ningún testigo. ¿Será que la víctima fue raptada o ha sido asesinada?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2002, una pequeña comunidad en el norte del estado de Nueva York quedó devastada cuando Patty Wlasiuk murió en un accidente de camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Atormentada por la desaparición de su madre, una joven emprendió su propia investigación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El ex amante de un sospechoso se presenta con una fantástica historia de asesinato, mutilación y cremación.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Dreams are on the line as the tryouts for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders 2013-2014 squad begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is mounting as 54 new candidates compete with 32 returning veterans for an invitation into the famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With 55 high caliber girls making it to finals, it's intimidating for the 30 veterans as they join the audition process & must fight to keep their place. Kitty Carter takes no prisoners as she prepares girls for their solos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp begins with 43 ladies, the pressure starts to build! Kelli's passion is infectious and intimidating in First Meeting, as she sets the expectations very high. Seven girls will be cut to make a squad of 36.

programme.desc: When a California housewife is murdered in broad daylight, the suspected killer claims it was a burglary gone awry.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nip/Suck
programme.desc: New York surprises the guys with the return of one man. Another man is unhappy as his world is suddenly turned upside down and he literally fears for his life.

programme.title: I Love New York: I Still Have Love for New York
programme.desc: New York invites the remaining six guys' exes to the house and this time, there's a special twist involved. She's bringing two of HER exes, Chance and Real, to help dig up some dirt on her guys.

programme.title: I Love New York: Mind Games
programme.desc: With 5 guys left, New York wants to find out who's the most compatible with her and who's just plain crazy, when she takes the boys for a psych test.

programme.title: I Love New York: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: With only four guys left it's time to clean house, literally. New York has invited some special guests-the guy's parents, so she gets her boys to scour and scrub her house for their arrival.

programme.title: I Love New York: Miami Thrice
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final three men to pack their bags because they're heading to Miami!

programme.title: I Love New York: Clip Show
programme.desc: In this 30-minute special episode, NY hosts a look back at hilarious, never-before-seen moments with our favorite guys from the series.

programme.title: I Love New York: Rasta Finale
programme.desc: After a season of ups and downs and a tense elimination in Miami, it's down to New York's final two suitors. They accompany New York to the tropics of Jamaica for the final showdown.

programme.desc: Flavor Flav knows everyone who's anyone in the hip hop industry and today he wants to have them all over to his house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Who Loves New York? (Photo Shoot To The Death)
programme.desc: Just like last season, Flav has invited a special guest from his past to help give him input on his selection of ladies.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Boxin' Each Other Out

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri’s in heaven-- not only does she have a terrific boyfriend, the wonderful romantic Rick, she also has the lead in the school play!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are back on track for Emma now that she’s officially over Sean. Chris has even asked her out! But when she hears rumours that Sean’s part of a gang stealing things from Degrassi (including Mr. Simpson’s laptop)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt, Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The bounty-hunter adventures of Duane "Dog" Chapman and his Posse are chronicled in this one hour "Best Of" special, featuring superlative memorable moments from the previous seven seasons.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. Dog and Beth make it their mission to both clean up the mess and teach him the fundamentals of bondsmanship.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues' gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: The Man From Nowhere
programme.desc: A quiet pawnshop keeper with a violent past takes on a drug-and-organ trafficking ring in hope of saving the child who is his only friend.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled)
programme.desc: Following immediately after the events of THE RAID, Rama (Iko Uwais) is forced to reinvent himself as an undercover cop in order to provide protection for his wife and child.

programme.title: Ong Bak
programme.desc: Raised by monks who taught him the Thai martial art of muay thai, Ting (Tony Jaa) is sent to Bangkok to retrieve the stolen head of the town's statue of the Buddha.

programme.title: Ong Bak 2: The Beginning

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was later found guilty in the slaying.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using the compass, the Rangers finally find the 3rd Jewel of the Corona Aurora. Will is entrusted to get it back to the base, but is ambushed by Kamdor & Miratrix, and loses it to the villainous pair.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The son of Lord Zedd and Rita Repulsa, Thrax, unites all four Corona Aurora-seeking factions of villains into a new Evil Alliance.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: No longer having Ranger powers, the former Overdrive Rangers return to their civilian lives. All but Mack, who learns of Thrax's plans to destroy Sentinel Knight, and seeks out the only item capable of doing so, the legendary sword Excelsior.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers get a day off, and plan a relaxing picnic in the forest. Unfortunately for Rose, Tyzonn is obsessed with getting to know her better, which goes from flattery to annoyance very quickly.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Ronny runs into a stubborn obstacle named Will while trying to throw a Halloween party. When she is captured to power Moltor and the Fearcats's latest weapon, can Will steal her back?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Norg and Will strike a strange alliance in their attempt to find the Fearcats' secret hideout. The equally strange alliance between Moltor, Mig and Benglo appears to be leading to the defeat of the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: While battling one of Kamdor's monsters, the Rangers get their computer systems infected with a virus. This exposes the deep secret of Mack's true nature to the Red Ranger, as he learns everything he ever knew was a lie!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: After learning about his true robotic nature, Mack starts to go through an identity crisis. When the Rangers battle Crazar, a Fearcat from Tyzonn's past, the Mercurian reveals unexpected things.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Mig and Benglo use the power of the Octavian Chalice, and unleash the mighty Agrios, a giant robotic creature that proves to be stronger than all the Rangers' Zords!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: While the other Rangers continue to be outmatched by the Fearcats and Agrios, Tyzonn begins to accept his fiance Vella's claims that he was never a Power Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using Mack's internal CPU to replay highlights from their Ranger careers, the team take the time to refresh their memories as to who has the Corona Aurora jewel.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using the Octavian Chalice, the Rangers journey to Greece in an attempt to find the next jewel via an ancient ritual. But Kamdor and Miratrix interrupt the ceremony, making their ultimate stand against their enemies!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers return to Egypt, then travel to Japan, and back again, all in their heated quest to find the key to unlock the last hidden jewel. But despite the ground covered, is it actually closer to home than they realize?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: With the ultimate power of the completed Corona Aurora at his disposal, Flurious freezes all of San Angeles and prepares to conquer the world in his new form. The Rangers must use their powersl to make their final stand against him.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Theo, Lily, and Casey, members of the secretive kung fu academy Pai Zhuq (Order of the Claw), are chosen ones to become the latest guardians of the ancient imprisoned spirit, Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With Mantor still plaguing the city, the Rangers are in desperate need of learning the ability to bring themselves up to his size. RJ refuses to teach his new pizza parlor employees/students this skill, until they can master individual weapons.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey requests extra training from RJ, and ends up doing seemingly menial housework for the mentor. The ancient spirit of the buffalo is harnessed for evil, as Camille brings about Buffalord.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The 5 Fingers of Poisons (lizardlike Gakko, cobraesque Naja, centipedish Rantipede, scorpionic Stingerella, and froggy Toady) are brought forth by Dai Shi, who doubly stuns the Rangers by finally revealing his human form to a familiar face.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The second Finger of Poison, Gakko, uses his wall-sticking skills to humiliate the Rangers when they try to face him on his own turf.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The friendship between Theo and Lily is tested by the Yellow Ranger's budding platonic relationship with Casey.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With RJ out of town, Casey is left in charge of Jungle Karma Pizza. Instead of asserting himself as the boss, he adds the power of responsibility equally to Theo and Lily, which quickly creates chaos in the pizza parlor.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The heavily armored Pangolin proves to be too tough of a nut for the Rangers to crack. Their only hope is a powerful weapon called the Jungle Mace, which lies in the hands of retired Pai Zhuq teacher, Master Phant.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey loses his $5 tip to a young boy named Josh, who wants to buy himself a kite. Can Casey teach Josh that the easy way isn't always the right way, while also figuring out how to put a stop to the slippery Slickagon?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Theo spreads his focus too thin, leading his teammates to question his effectiveness in battle.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Thanks to Carnisoar's training, Jarrod has become more ruthless than ever. Camille is pushed aside for the last time, and thanks to some advice from Lily, decides to get a new master.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Casey anxiously awaits the arrival of his second master, but RJ begins to feel forgotten as a result. It gets worse for him when the master of the Shark technique arrives, and turns out to be his estranged father, Master Finn!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After another victorious battle against Camille's monsters, the Rangers feel they are unstoppable. RJ warns them about being overconfident. He tells them to train on their basic stances.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With RJ captured, the Rangers must travel to the spirit world to find the last 3 remaining masters. Theo, Lily, and Casey must face their own childhood fears in order to pass their test.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Everyone is still making fun of Lily for being too nice. After a battle with Porcupongo, Lily is fed up with being so nice and shows her bad side. Lily becomes a rude customer at JKP and refuses to help the other Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After his last battle with Dai Shi, RJ has major problems controlling his animal spirit. He turns into a werewolf and becomes a big threat to anyone around him. RJ learns to lean on his friends and not run away from them when he has a problem.

programme.title: Workaholics
programme.desc: When Alice introduces an automated calling system, Blake imagines a future where the machines have taken over.

programme.title: RENO 911!
programme.desc: The investigation into Sheriff Chechekevitch's murder zeroes in on his ex-wife, and Williams and Wiegel attend a Lamaze class.

programme.title: RENO 911!
programme.desc: Jones and Garcia discover that not just anyone can dispense justice from horseback.

programme.title: RENO 911!
programme.desc: Dangle visits his ex-wife and her new husband on their anniversary, and the lady deputies stake out a lecherous meth dealer and his girlfriends.

programme.title: RENO 911!
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department takes more than seven hours to respond to a liquor store robbery.

programme.title: Clerks II
programme.desc: A calamity at Dante and Randall's shops sends them looking for new horizons, but they ultimately settle at Mooby's, a fictional Disney-McDonald's-style fast-food empire. Sequel to the 1994 film by Kevin Smith.

programme.title: Clerks III
programme.desc: Following a massive heart attack, Randal enlists his friends and fellow clerks Dante, Elias, Jay, and Silent Bob to make a movie immortalizing his life at the convenience store that started it all.

programme.title: The 4:30 Movie
programme.desc: In Kevin Smith's most personal film to date, a teenage cinephile tries to woo the girl of his dreams while dealing with a hilarious mix of friends and enemies at his local cinema.

programme.title: Jay and Silent Bob Reboot
programme.desc: Jay and Silent Bob return to Hollywood to stop a reboot of the BLUNTMAN AND CHRONIC movie from getting made.

programme.title: Freaks and Geeks
programme.desc: Yearning to fit in yet wanting to be themselves, Lindsay Weir, her brother Sam, and a diverse group of friends struggle to get through 1980 at William McKinley High School.

programme.title: Blue Mountain State
programme.desc: When his pre-game rituals start to betray his game-time performance, Harmon goes on a quest to find new mystical superstitions that will restore his kicking abilities.

programme.title: Blue Mountain State
programme.desc: As Coach Daniels prepares to be inducted into the College Hall of Fame, Thad comes to terms with some troubling secrets from Daniels' past while Alex connects with Marty on a new level.

programme.title: The IT Crowd

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Investigación de incendios: antorchas de seguros, quemaduras de personas y asesinatos de incendios: estos crímenes están diseñados para destruir todas las pistas. Pero se puede construir un caso sólido a partir de un montón de cenizas.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Ocultar un cuerpo puede ser difícil. A veces, es más fácil esconder o disfrazar las circunstancias de la muerte, convertir el asesinato en suicidio o culpar a otra persona. La verdad sale a la luz a través de pistas sutiles tomadas de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: La fuerza de policía local quedó atónita cuando el cuerpo de una mujer joven no identificada apareció en una vía en su pequeña ciudad de Pensilvania.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Desde mayo hasta julio de 1984, Alton Coleman y su pareja de hecho, Denis Brown, se involucraron en una ola de asesinatos que atravesó seis estados y que dejó ocho personas muertas, entre ellos, niños.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 20 de agosto de 1980, un francotirador invisible asesinó a dos hombres negros jóvenes mientras trotaban con dos mujeres blancas en Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Delaware desapareció en 1996, sus amigos y su familia descubrieron su vida secreta. La secretaria del gobernador había tenido un amorío ilícito con un hombre casado y acaudalado.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un conductor atrevido causa una persecución loca. Un pollero tiene una explicación poco clara de los objetos descubiertos en su carro. Un hombre impulsivo no reconocer sus errores fácilmente.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso que conduce ebrio dice que sólo salió a comprar un bocadillo. Una pareja se delata cuando la policía hace preguntas. La policía detiene a alguien que cree que se le tendió una trampa.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre intenta pelear con todo el vecindario. Un fugitivo está convencido de que la policía le dijo que se fuera en su bicicleta. Una mamá joven con problemas tiene una segunda oportunidad.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un motociclista causa una persecución por las calles. Ni un carro que no prende impide que un hombre corra de la policía. Un conductor no logra evadir a la policía y se disculpa raramente con su novia.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Durante una parada de tránsito un sospechoso decide huir a campo través. Una mujer rehúsa mentir por el amigo de su hijo. Se captura en video a un hombre escondiendo artículos en un lugar obvio.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: El último esfuerzo para huir de la policía termina en llamas. Varias unidades se unen para acabar con una situación peligrosa. La policía vigila una batalla de custodia conllevando comestibles caros.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Unas placas raras ayudan a prevenir un robo. Una pelea por un amor no correspondido se torna violenta. La policía detiene a un hombre sin ropa por un presunto incendio provocado.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Se desmiente a un sospechoso cuando su víctima presenta un video de seguridad. El miedo le gana a un conductor cuando trata de escapar. Un viaje de noche al mercado termina en llanto.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Balística: se encuentra un cadáver con una herida de bala en la cabeza; el arma se encuentra al lado de la víctima. Parece un suicidio, pero ¿podría ser un asesinato?

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Toxicología: las drogas pueden curar enfermedades y aliviar el dolor, pero también pueden ser agentes de asesinato.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Terrorismo: debido a la nueva tecnología y, quizás, al próximo milenio, el terrorismo es una amenaza internacional y creciente. La explosión de Oklahoma City y el bombardeo del World Trade Center son solamente dos de los incidentes causados por esta amenaza.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: No importa cuán caótica o limpia parezca la escena del crimen, el culpable siempre deja algo atrás. De vez en cuando, es solamente una huella dactilar o una huella del zapato. A veces, eso es todo lo que se necesita.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
